steps.title: Find volume from density
steps.content:
Apply the density formula: $\text{Density} = \frac{\text{Mass}}{\text{Volume}}$
Solving for volume: $\text{Volume} = \frac{\text{Mass}}{\text{Density}} = \frac{358}{347} \approx 1.0317 \text{ m}^3$

steps.title: Find edge length and round
steps.content:
For a cube, $s^3 = \text{Volume}$. Substituting:
$$s^3 = 1.0317$$
$$s = \sqrt[3]{1.0317} \approx 1.0105$$
Rounding to the nearest hundredth: 1.0105 -> 1.01
That confirms B is correct.
